findings.evidence: `code/TauCeti/Topology/Algebra/HomeomorphAction.lean:36` defines the subgroup-only instance; `mathlib/Mathlib/Topology/Algebra/MulAction.lean:222` has `Submonoid.continuousSMul`, and `:232` derives `Subgroup.continuousSMul` from `S.toSubmonoid.continuousSMul`; `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Submonoid/MulAction.lean:101` shows submonoid scalar action is just the ambient action.
findings.fix: Replace it with a `Submonoid.continuousConstSMul {M X} [Monoid M] [TopologicalSpace X] [MulAction M X] [ContinuousConstSMul M X] (S : Submonoid M) : ContinuousConstSMul S X`, and derive the subgroup case via `S.toSubmonoid` if a named subgroup instance is still needed.
findings.issue: `TauCeti.Subgroup.continuousConstSMul` only transfers `ContinuousConstSMul` to subgroups, but the same proof works for any submonoid action and Mathlib states the analogous joint-continuity transfer first for `Submonoid`.

summary: The diffeomorphism action API itself is at the expected level, but the new generic continuity transfer is still one level too special.
